title: Build per-quiz analytics detail page with breakdown visualizations
completion_summary: Built per-quiz analytics detail page with 5 stat cards, top answers/products ranked lists with count bars, funnel drop-off chart, time-series bar chart, date range filter, and loading skeleton. 4 files: page.tsx, funnel-chart.tsx, time-series-chart.tsx, top-items-list.tsx, loading.tsx
acceptance_criteria: Server component fetches quiz analytics from GET /api/admin/quizzes/[id]/analytics
Renders quiz name and summary stats header (views, completions, conversion rate)
Renders top answers section: ranked list of top 10 answers with count bars
Renders top products section: ranked list of top 10 products with thumbnail and count
Renders funnel visualization: horizontal bar chart or Sankey showing question-by-question drop-off
Renders time-series chart: line/area chart of daily views and completions (last 30 days)
Date range filter via ?from=/&to= query params
404 page when quiz not found or belongs to different store
Responsive: charts reflow on mobile, sections stack vertically
